Interface CocoRepository

All Known Implementing Classes:
JdbcCocoRepository
public interface CocoRepository
Read-side repository for COCO campaign dashboards and reports.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    CocoCampaignDetail
    getCampaign(String campaignId)
    Gets one campaign detail row.
    List<CocoAggregateMetric>
    listAggregates(String campaignId)
    Lists aggregate rows for campaign.
    PageResult<CocoCampaignListItem>
    listCampaigns(CocoCampaignQuery query)
    Lists campaigns with optional filtering and pagination.
    List<CocoOptimizerConfigRow>
    listOptimizers(String campaignId)
    Lists optimizer config rows for campaign.
    PageResult<CocoTrialMetric>
    listTrials(String campaignId, String optimizerId, Integer functionId, Integer dimension, Boolean reachedTarget, int page, int size)
    Lists trial rows for campaign with optional filters.
